headline: Piper Sandler Raises Price Target on Kimberly-Clark Corporation (KMB) on Productivity Gains
summary: Kimberly-Clark Corporation (NASDAQ:KMB) ranks among the top NASDAQ stocks for retirement. Piper Sandler increased its price objective for Kimberly-Clark Corporation (NASDAQ:KMB) to $121 from $115 on June 17, while keeping an Overweight rating on the company’s shares. The firm highlighted that cost headwinds remain relatively manageable, aided by solid productivity gains and a recent drop […]

headline: Kimberly-Clark Is Now My Largest Non-Commodities-Related Stock Position
summary: Kimberly-Clark Corporation buy case: core holding after 30% drop, 4.8% dividend yield, 3% position sizing, and upside to new highs. Click for this KMB update.

headline: Introducing Arbex: a New Global Leader in Tissue and Hygiene
summary: LONDON, July 01, 2026--Arbex, a new global leader in tissue and hygiene, today commences operations as an independent business and unveils details of its brand, leadership team, and company structure. Announced in June 2025 as a $3.4 billion joint venture between Suzano (NYSE: SUZ), the world’s largest pulp supplier, and Kimberly-Clark Corporation (NASDAQ: KMB), a global leader in consumer goods and personal care, the new business will manufacture, market and distribute consumer and professional
